title: 'Apheqah #0664
definition:
Aphekah = "enclosure"

 1) a city near Hebron in Judah
 2) (BDB) possibly a group of cities including Hebron
nasbUsage:
Definition: Aphekah = "enclosure"

 1) a city near Hebron in Judah
 2) (BDB) possibly a group of cities including Hebron

    NASB:  perh. fortress, a city in Pal.
